title: LavidaCraft + Fresh Animations Compatibility
description: Makes LavidaCraft compatible with Fresh Animations
body:
Thanks for all the downloads! Please check out [LavidaCraft](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/lavidacraft) if you like this project.

Adds compatibility for [LavidaCraft](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/lavidacraft) and [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)

Intended to be used with LavidaCraft, but y'all seem to like using this by itself. Fair enough I guess.

[ETF](https://modrinth.com/project/BVzZfTc1), [EMF](https://modrinth.com/project/4I1XuqiY), and [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) are all required for this pack to work correctly.

<details>
<summary>Permissions</summary>

You may:
- Modify this pack for personal use
- Include this project in modpacks uploaded to Modrinth

You may not:
- Reupload or redistribute this pack or any assets from this page in ANY form

</details>

<details>
<summary>About Updates</summary>

This pack will only be updated alongside [LavidaCraft](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/lavidacraft) or when Fresh Animations updates break it.

I usually only test pack updates on the latest version of Minecraft. Resource packs are almost always backwards and forwards compatible. If you experience any issues or if the pack doesn't work, please report it to me.

</details>

If you have a feature request, feel free to create an issue on my issue tracker

Consider leaving a small tip on Venmo? @Lad_Flaver
